title: sideritis fruticulosa subsp. tarraconensis
intro: Sideritis fruticulosa subsp. tarraconensis, also known as Tarraconensis or Catalan Ironwort, is a plant species belonging to the genus Sideritis and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sideritis fruticulosa subsp. tarraconensis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with the herbal preparations often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
